text:
マザーとアルの融合の結果、生まれた
新たなる幻創種、エスカダーカー。
その凶刃は、ヒツギやコオリの学校である
天星学院へと向かう。
――――――――――――――――――――
失敗条件/戦闘不能後、リタイアを選択

マザーとアルの融合の結果、生まれた
新たなる幻創種、エスカダーカー。
その凶刃は、ヒツギやコオリの学校である
天星学院へと向かう。

The phantasm Eska Falspawn was born of the
union between Mother and Al.
His sights, along with his deadly blade,
were pointed firmly at the Celestia Academy
where Hitsugi and Kohri were students.
---------------------------------------------------------
You will fail this quest if you become incapacitated
or retire.

The Phantasm Eska Falspawn was born of the union between
Mother and Al. His sights, along with his deadly blade,
were pointed firmly at the Celestia Academy
where Hitsugi and Kohri were students.
ヒツギたちと共に学校を守れ！
Protect the school alongside Hitsugi and his friends!
惑星・地球　天星学院校門
